message:
feat: enhance backup, chaos testing, and workflow modules

Core Modules:
- backup.rs: Improved backup functionality with better state
  preservation and recovery mechanisms
- chaos.rs: Enhanced chaos testing capabilities for robustness
  validation of automation workflows
- crash.rs: Better crash detection and handling with improved
  recovery strategies
- workflows.rs: Workflow execution improvements and state
  management refinements

Housekeeping:
- .beads/issues.jsonl: Issue tracker state sync

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

-            extracted: Default::default(),

             span: (0, 20),
